name: Diving Bell Spider

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It swims into range and bites with a short direct strike underwater.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move vertically or block when it comes straight at you.
attacks.notes: It lacks long combos; its pressure comes from repeating simple bites.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It lines itself up with you before accelerating into a stronger lunge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge up or down at the last moment to leave its line.
attacks.notes: This is its most dangerous hit while patrolling the pond.

description: A hostile underwater spider that patrols the Koi Pond and the caves below. It is one of the major threats of the early pond biome.
behavior: It swims alone or in small groups, hunting prey among tunnels, caves, and submerged plants. It does not need long combos to stay threatening underwater.
interactionWithPlayer: It is immediately hostile to the player. Because you usually meet it while wearing diving gear instead of full armor, its bites hit harder than they first seem on paper.
interactionWithCreatures: It frequently attacks passive pond creatures for food. Tadpoles and other small prey are often its first targets.
strategy: Do not stand still trading blows. Underwater combat favors moving up and down, using fast weapons, and taking advantage of the fact that it has no long combo strings.
respawnInfo: 2 days by default. In the pond depths it takes 1 day.
specialTraits: When killed, it restores 35% of the player’s oxygen meter, usually buying at least about 60 seconds.
